notes: New Tab page: the practice exercise written out as real tablature, fully linked with the Fretboard - root, scale, mode, pattern, and direction stay in sync both ways (Chords follows along too). View it horizontally (fit-to-screen systems or one scrolling line) or vertically, in three text sizes. The old Tab strip on the Fretboard page is gone. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
